summary: The diff implements the OrbitDock component (frontend/src/components/OrbitDock.tsx), integrates it into HomePage.tsx, adds CSS keyframes in index.css, and updates project state files. Most requirements are addressed. However, the diff is truncated, making it impossible to fully verify all acceptance criteria. Based on visible evidence, the core structure is present but several specific AC items cannot be confirmed from the truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Animation duration for swipe transition must be 220–260ms with ease-in-out easing. The swipe timeout in the visible code is set to 300ms, which is outside the required range.
missing_requirements.reason: The visible OrbitDock.tsx code uses setTimeout(..., 300) for the swipe state reset, suggesting the animation duration may be 300ms rather than the required 220–260ms.

missing_requirements.requirement: On swipe initiation, the glow arc and label must fade out before/during the rotation. The rotation animation must have a subtle momentum feel (slight overshoot or ease-out deceleration).
missing_requirements.reason: The truncated diff does not show the rendering portion of OrbitDock.tsx where the glow arc/label fade-out and momentum/overshoot effect would be implemented. Cannot confirm presence from visible code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Folders icon displays a subtle layered-depth visual effect (e.g., a gentle shadow stack).
missing_requirements.reason: The truncated diff does not show the rendering section of OrbitDock.tsx where the Folders shadow-stack treatment would appear. Cannot confirm from visible code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Orbital arc animation, scale transitions, and micro-interactions are all fully disabled under reduced motion with a flat horizontal slide and no scale changes.
missing_requirements.reason: The useReducedMotion hook is imported and used, but the rendering portion showing the conditional flat slide logic is truncated. Cannot confirm the full reduced-motion fallback behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: A behindOverlay prop is added to OrbitDock that was not specified in the build request.
hallucinated_features.reason: The OrbitDock interface includes behindOverlay as an optional boolean prop which has no corresponding requirement in the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Only the active center icon appears to be clickable, with inactive icons not directly tappable to navigate.
hallucinated_features.reason: The visible handleItemClick code checks if index equals activeIndex before acting, which may contradict REQ-6 requirement that tapping each icon navigates to the correct section.
